overall.description: Gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a student character in wizard robes and pointed hat exploring the castle interior, ascending past a golden statue, walking through portrait-lined corridors, and traversing a grand hall before climbing a spiral staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase hall with golden statue

events.description: character passes the golden wizard statue while ascending the stairs
reaches top of stairs and enters upper corridor

agents.ego_description: walking up the wide stone steps toward and past the large golden statue at the landing

wide worn stone steps with high walls on either side
tall pointed stone arch at the top of the staircase
iron torch holder with flame mounted on the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character begins at the bottom of a grand stone staircase, ascending past a large golden wizard statue. The hall is lit by wall-mounted torches, with gothic arches visible at the top of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: portrait gallery corridor with spiral staircase view

events.description: enters the circular portrait room with the spiral staircase visible in the center
character glances upward at the tall tower spiral staircase

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the corridor lined with animated portraits, pausing briefly to look up

entered.detail: stone walls covered with framed animated portraits of historical figures
stone walls covered with framed animated portraits of historical figures
tall winding stone staircase attached to the tower wall
ornate carved stone balustrade along the corridor edge

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow portrait gallery, the walls are lined with moving paintings. The corridor opens into a circular room where a tall spiral staircase winds upward, visible against the stone walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridors leading to grand hall

events.description: enters darker stone corridor with pointed gothic arches
enters the large wooden grand hall with high vaulted ceilings

agents.ego_description: walking through stone corridors and passing other students in wizard robes

student standing against the wall near a window

simple wooden bench against the corridor wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves through darker stone corridors with gothic arches, passing other students walking in the opposite direction. The environment transitions from portrait-lined walls to wood-paneled halls with large windows.

events.description: character approaches and begins ascending the grand spiral staircase

agents.ego_description: walking across the expansive grand hall and ascending the spiral staircase

notable_agents.action: student walking across the grand hall in the distance

entered.detail: massive pointed archways supporting the high vaulted ceiling
large chandelier hanging from the ceiling with multiple lights
stone spiral staircase with carved balustrade in the center of the hall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a vast grand hall with high vaulted ceilings, wooden paneling, and large windows. After crossing the marble floor, the character approaches and begins ascending a grand spiral staircase.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the gothic interiors of a magical castle, transitioning from torch-lit stone staircases to a vast, light-filled grand hall. It begins at the base of a grand stone staircase, ascending past a large golden wizard statue beneath towering gothic arches. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts into a narrow gallery lined with moving paintings before opening into a circular room featuring a winding spiral staircase. The path then leads through darker stone corridors and past other students, with the environment gradually transitioning from cold stone to warm wood-paneled halls. Finally, the camera enters a vast grand hall with high vaulted ceilings and large windows, crossing the marble floor to begin ascending another grand spiral staircase.
